## Change Management Review (GRC)
**Risk ID:** RR-004
**Type of Change:** [ ] Policy Update [ ] Risk Mitigation [ ] Compliance Gap Closure

### Validation Checklist
- [ ] Change aligns with NIST/SANS standards.
- [ ] Impact assessment completed (Likelihood vs. Impact).
- [ ] Peer review conducted for regulatory accuracy.
- [ ] Strategic alignment with business objectives verified.
